description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding in graphic print on the front and brand tag appliquéd on the left sleeve Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Adopt a winning attitude with this red T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and shoulders 18”
